title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Larsen & Toubro

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Larsen & Toubro
jsonLd.description:
Larsen & Toubro is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Larsen & Toubro:
Larsen & Toubro is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Larsen & Toubro!
